top_trades.reason: Massive $2M+ premium on deeply ITM puts 82% below current price represents either sophisticated hedging or a complex spread strategy. The tight bid-ask spread ($3.45) on such an expensive option indicates institutional involvement with March 2026 expiration providing over a year for portfolio protection.

Largest size trade at 227 contracts with $1.7M premium on puts just 18% ITM shows significant bearish positioning or hedging activity. The substantial volume combined with relatively modest moneyness suggests institutional conviction in downside protection ahead of March 2026.

Highest volume call trade with 251 contracts at $1.46M premium on slightly ITM strikes indicates bullish positioning with reasonable bid-ask spread. The 13.8% ITM position with March 2026 expiration suggests strategic accumulation expecting MSFT to maintain or exceed current levels.

High volume at 204 contracts with $1.39M premium on calls 25% ITM demonstrates bullish conviction with March 2026 expiration. The significant size at this strike level suggests institutional positioning expecting AAPL to maintain current price levels or higher over the next year.

Significant $1.74M premium on deeply ITM TSLA calls at 235 strike (42% ITM) with March 2026 expiration represents strong bullish positioning. The tight spread and substantial premium indicate conviction that TSLA will remain well above $235 through 2026, possibly part of a delta-hedging strategy.
